name: Manifesting Crystal
description: Radiating inner power, this princely weapon settles and clarities your thoughts. When manifesting a power, the bearer of this weapon can draw 5 power points from it. These points must all be used on the same power, and that power cannot be imbued with power points from any other source. A manifester weapon functions once per day.
unidentifiedDesc: A princely psionic weapon augmentation crystal.
